Off Calendar Mar-26-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Petitioner George Petty Hearing For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus (Added For Purposes Of Entering Tentative Ruling)

Off calendar as a duplicate entry for tentative ruling purposes only. (302/EPS)

Notice Of Hearing For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Mar-26-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Matthew J. McNaughton, Esq., Carcione Cattermole, et al, 650-367-6811, appearing for Plaintiff George J. Petty who is also present;
Rebecca A Liu, Esq., Deputy city Attorney, CCSF, 415-554-3870, appearing for Defendant San Francisco Empoyees Retirement Systems;

RULING - A R G U E D. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tenatative ruling with modifications as stated in the submitted order that is agreed to by all parties and signed in open court. (see scanned order)

PETITIONER GEORGE PETTY'S Hearing For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus.

Petitioner George Petty's petition for writ of administrative mandamus is granted and the administrative decision denying Mr. Petty's application for industrial disability is set aside. (see word minutes for completes details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
